title: Index.VerifyImport result
description: verify-v0 P1.U3. `resolves` + `resolution`. Final segment present → resolves:true, exact. Single-segment path decidably absent → resolves:false, not_found, ranked candidates[]. Multi-segment path whose final segment is absent (or otherwise undecidable) → indeterminate + reason (no confident false negative), with optional candidates[].

reason.description: IndeterminateReason wire string. Present only when resolution is `indeterminate`.
